reason: Frontend ownership boundaries and pre-development checklist for settings UI and translation services.
Settings category composition, shadcn controls, Chinese product copy, and Translation view ASS boundary.
Keep AppSettings in the existing Tauri-backed local draft rather than introducing a Zustand store.
Cross-layer AppSettings types and translation-domain type placement.
Translation HTTP remains in frontend services and settings IPC stays on the existing typed bridge.
Rust ownership is limited to persisted settings and migration.
Settings input normalization and secret-safe logging requirements.
Exact existing settings, migration, adapter, concurrency, UI, and test evidence.
Official OpenAI-compatible, Gemini, and Anthropic REST and model-list contracts.
